title: Secure Hybrid AI Development Hub
purpose: Deterministic local control plane for policy-safe hybrid AI development
implemented_scope: Phases 0–10 and Phase 11 synthetic hardening; authorized low-risk client pilot remains pending
unresolved_risks: Live research is disabled by default; one ignored synthetic runtime explicitly approved docs.python.org only. SearXNG, real secret backends, cloud transmission, and real CI/CD transports remain disabled until separately approved
Installed gemma3:1b failed the corrected guided/researched file-level workflow; installed qwen3:1.7b has not yet been evaluated through this corrected path
Same-user direct runtime database access and local approver identity require operational hardening before regulated use
Quality execution requires Linux Landlock and user/PID/IPC/UTS/network namespace support; Windows executables are denied
Secret and regulated-data scanners have documented false-positive and false-negative limits
The authoritative Phase 11 low-risk client pilot was not performed because development was explicitly synthetic-only; production/regulatory readiness is not claimed
